title: noccaea jankae
intro: Noccaea jankae, also known as Jank's penny-cress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of the Balkan Peninsula, known for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Noccaea jankae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
